name: T-Bone
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 365; Episode 257

Captain T-Bone (Ｔボーン大佐 Tī Bōn Taisa) is a Marine officer working with the Government agency CP9.  T-Bone has rather a skull-like face, but he is a very honorable and considerate person, and absolutely abhors needless violence. His main fault is his tendency to take life very seriously- although he values the soldiers under his command, he has a tendency to fuss over their minor problems in a melodramatic manner, which can make them uncomfortable.  

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
